caption: A screen recording captures a video conference call during a presentation. A person wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones appears in a small inset window at the top right of the screen. The main display shows a dark-themed digital mind map or flowchart with various circular nodes connected by lines; some nodes contain small icons or images. A separate video window on the right side of the presentation screen shows a group of people in a room, including one person in a red shirt. The top of the browser window displays several open tabs, including "True Learning by Systemini," "Future of Society by Systemini," "Insights | Introduction | Kumu," and "Rural Community Food System." The browser address bar shows "blackboard.uoi.learning." Throughout the sequence, the visual elements remain static, with no significant movement or changes occurring between the captured moments.
